title: Trial Airship
description: A vast airships filled with many dangers and treasures.
body:
This datapacks adds a new structure to the game. The trial airship spawns in deep oceans and in snow plains biomes. This structure contains trial chamber spawners as well as vaults. They are similar rarity to woodland mansions, even being a bit rarer.


They contain many redstone contraptions for you to discovers. With over 20 unique rooms each airship you explore should feel fresh and new. Discovers the secrets that lay within the walls of the ship with a handful of secret areas and books revealing the mysteries behind the ship.


Disclaimers for using in a survival world; this structure contains the 4 element paintings which arent available in survival however you are unable to pick these up/move them. It also contains 4 player heads of the builders.



I am planning on making this into a fabric mods as well as possibly adding a forge mod if there is a demand.



Special thanks to 
Atran135
Sweatpeaaaaa
Pancake5s 
For helping design some of the rooms found within the airship.

Shaders used and recommended for best experience:
https://modrinth.com/shader/solas-shader


For any improvements or suggestions please dont hesitate to contact me at my email: lithalisk@gmail.com
